summary: Dashboard mobile narrow layout successfully implements core functionality with proper navigation and content sections. Public beta framing and primary CTA button use correct diner palette colors. Minor violations include neutral background colors that deviate from the established diner brand palette.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/beige backgrounds instead of required diner palette surfaces (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea variants)
Logged-in dashboard surface uses generic neutral palette while public routes use distinct diner brand treatment, creating visual brand discontinuity

actions: Update dashboard background to use diner palette surfaces from M.universal.1 (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea variants)
Ensure card surfaces use cream/white variants from the declared diner palette rather than neutral grays
Maintain current pink CTA button treatment and beta banner styling as they correctly follow diner brand guidelines
